message:
fix(drasi): shrink flow dots and connection lines (#7863)

The SVG flow dots rendered as huge bubbles (~12px) because r=2.5 in a
100-unit viewBox scales up aggressively on real card dimensions, and
the svg used preserveAspectRatio=none which also stretched dots into
ovals.

- Reduce circle radius: 2.5 → 0.6
- Reduce stroke width: 1.5 → 0.4
- Use vectorEffect=non-scaling-stroke so lines render at a consistent
  pixel width regardless of card size
- Switch animateMotion dur/begin from ms strings to seconds (better
  cross-browser support)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
